close_reason: Completed as js-deps-cell.nix - covers both JavaScript and TypeScript
description:
Create Nix module to build TypeScript deps cell from typescript-deps.toml:

Similar to go-deps-cell.nix, rust-deps-cell.nix, python-deps-cell.nix:
- Read typescript-deps.toml
- Fetch npm packages using URLs and hashes
- Generate BUCK files exposing packages as targets
- Create cell structure for symlink to .turnkey/tsdeps

Location: nix/buck2/typescript-deps-cell.nix
title: Create typescript-deps-cell.nix
